prerequisites: A RentCast account, created at https://app.rentcast.io/app/api.
An active API billing plan (RentCast offers a free plan and paid plans); a plan must be selected and activated before keys can be created.
A RentCast API key generated from the API dashboard, supplied to the connector's required api_key field.

Optional property-search filters to scope the data pulled, set via the connector's config fields such as address, city, state, zipcode, latitude, longitude, radius, property_type, bedrooms, bath_rooms, status, days_old, history_range, and data_type_.

authMethods.name: API key (X-Api-Key header)
authMethods.summary: RentCast authenticates every request with an API key. Provide the key in the connector's api_key field; the connector sends it in the X-Api-Key HTTP header. The key identifies your account and tracks usage and billing, so keep it secret and never expose it in client-facing code. You can create multiple keys to track separate applications, and delete and replace any key that is compromised.

setupSteps.title: Create a RentCast account
setupSteps.body: Sign up for a RentCast account at https://app.rentcast.io/app/api. The API dashboard is where you manage billing plans and API keys.

setupSteps.title: Select and activate an API plan
setupSteps.body: Choose and activate an API billing plan from the dashboard. RentCast offers a free plan (50 requests per month) and paid plans with a fixed monthly price plus per-request overage fees once the included quota is exceeded. A plan must be active before you can generate a key.

setupSteps.title: Create an API key
setupSteps.body: From the API dashboard, click Create API Key and follow the prompts. You can create multiple keys to track usage for different applications independently. Copy the key value, since it authenticates all requests.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector credentials
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key in the connector's required api_key field. The connector passes it in the X-Api-Key header on each request to https://api.rentcast.io/v1.

setupSteps.title: Set the property-search filters
setupSteps.body: Configure the optional config fields to scope which property records the connector pulls. Available filters include address, city, state, zipcode, latitude, longitude, radius, property_type, bedrooms, bath_rooms, status, days_old, history_range, and data_type_. All are optional; leave unused filters blank.
